---
title: "Data exploration_P3"
author: "Mahfuza Haque Mahi"
date: "2026-04-01"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(pwr)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(powertools)
library(ggplot2)
library(reshape2)
library(tidyverse)
library(skimr)
library(tableone)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
library(corrplot)
df <- read.csv(here::here("Project3/DataRaw", "frmgham2.csv"))
```


```{r}
# Initial overview of the dataset
str(df)
head(df)
nrow(df)
summary(df)
```

```{r}
# View the Missingness pattern of variables:
naniar::gg_miss_var(df)
naniar::vis_miss(df)
```

```{r}
# Check structure
# Number of visits per subject
table(table(df$RANDID))
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# FRAMINGHAM HEART STUDY - Initial Data Exploration
# ===========================================================
# Dataset Dimension
dim(df)

# Variable Names
names(df)

# Data Types 
str(df)


# ── BASIC STRUCTURE ──────────────────────────────────────

# Number of unique participants
cat("Unique participants:", n_distinct(df$RANDID), "\n")

# Observations per period
table(df$PERIOD)

# Participants by sex (period 1 only)
df %>% filter(PERIOD == 1) %>% count(SEX) %>%
  mutate(SEX = ifelse(SEX == 1, "Men", "Women"))

# How many exams did each participant attend?
df %>%
  count(RANDID) %>%
  count(n, name = "participants") %>%
  rename(exams_attended = n)


# ── MISSING DATA ─────────────────────────────────────────

# Overall missingness summary (all periods)

miss_summary <- df %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~sum(is.na(.)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "variable", values_to = "n_missing") %>%
  mutate(pct_missing = round(n_missing / nrow(df) * 100, 1)) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_missing))
print(miss_summary, n = 40)

# Missingness at BASELINE only (Period 1)
base_miss <- df %>%
  filter(PERIOD == 1) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~sum(is.na(.)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "variable", values_to = "n_missing") %>%
  mutate(pct_missing = round(n_missing / nrow(df[df$PERIOD==1,]) * 100, 1)) %>%
  filter(n_missing > 0) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_missing))
print(base_miss)
```


```{r}
# ── TABLE 1 – BASELINE CHARACTERISTICS BY SEX ────────────

baseline <- df %>%
  filter(PERIOD == 1) %>%
  mutate(
    SEX_label   = factor(SEX, labels = c("Men", "Women")),
    CURSMOKE    = factor(CURSMOKE, labels = c("No", "Yes")),
    DIABETES    = factor(DIABETES, labels = c("No", "Yes")),
    BPMEDS      = factor(BPMEDS,   labels = c("No", "Yes")),
    PREVCHD     = factor(PREVCHD,  labels = c("No", "Yes")),
    PREVSTRK    = factor(PREVSTRK, labels = c("No", "Yes")),
    PREVHYP     = factor(PREVHYP,  labels = c("No", "Yes")),
    STROKE      = factor(STROKE,   labels = c("No", "Yes")),
    DEATH       = factor(DEATH,    labels = c("No", "Yes"))
  )

cont_vars <- c("AGE","SYSBP","DIABP","TOTCHOL","BMI",
               "GLUCOSE","HEARTRTE","CIGPDAY")
cat_vars  <- c("CURSMOKE","DIABETES","BPMEDS",
               "PREVCHD","PREVSTRK","PREVHYP","STROKE","DEATH")

tab1 <- CreateTableOne(
  vars     = c(cont_vars, cat_vars),
  factorVars = cat_vars,
  strata   = "SEX_label",
  data     = baseline,
  addOverall = TRUE
)

print(tab1, showAllLevels = FALSE, smd = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# ── OUTCOME FREQUENCIES ──────────────────────────────────

cat("\n── Stroke & Death by Sex (full follow-up) ──\n")
baseline %>%
  group_by(SEX_label) %>%
  summarise(
    N            = n(),
    Stroke_n     = sum(STROKE == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE),
    Stroke_pct   = round(mean(STROKE == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 1),
    Death_n      = sum(DEATH == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE),
    Death_pct    = round(mean(DEATH == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 1)
  )

# 10-year stroke outcome (<=3652 days)
baseline <- baseline %>%
  mutate(
    stroke_10y = as.integer(STROKE == "Yes" & TIMESTRK <= 3652),
    time_10y   = pmin(TIMESTRK, 3652)
  )

cat("\n── 10-Year Stroke Events by Sex ──\n")
baseline %>%
  group_by(SEX_label) %>%
  summarise(
    N          = n(),
    Events     = sum(stroke_10y, na.rm = TRUE),
    Rate_pct   = round(mean(stroke_10y, na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 2)
  )


# ── DISTRIBUTIONS OF CONTINUOUS VARIABLES ────────────────

cont_long <- baseline %>%
  select(SEX_label, all_of(cont_vars)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-SEX_label, names_to = "variable", values_to = "value")

# Histograms by sex
ggplot(cont_long, aes(x = value, fill = SEX_label)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, alpha = 0.6, position = "identity") +
  facet_wrap(~variable, scales = "free", ncol = 4) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("steelblue", "tomato")) +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Continuous Variables at Baseline by Sex",
       fill = "Sex", x = NULL, y = "Count") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 11)

# Boxplots: stroke_10y vs each continuous variable
baseline_long <- baseline %>%
  mutate(Stroke_10y = factor(stroke_10y, labels = c("No Stroke","Stroke"))) %>%
  select(SEX_label, Stroke_10y, all_of(cont_vars)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-c(SEX_label, Stroke_10y), names_to = "variable", values_to = "value")

ggplot(baseline_long, aes(x = Stroke_10y, y = value, fill = Stroke_10y)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.5, alpha = 0.7) +
  facet_grid(SEX_label ~ variable, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("steelblue", "tomato")) +
  labs(title = "Continuous Risk Factors by 10-Year Stroke Outcome and Sex",
       x = NULL, y = NULL, fill = NULL) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 10) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))


# ── CORRELATION MATRIX (continuous vars, baseline) ────────

cor_mat <- baseline %>%
  select(all_of(cont_vars), stroke_10y) %>%
  cor(use = "pairwise.complete.obs")

corrplot(cor_mat,
         method  = "color",
         type    = "upper",
         addCoef.col = "black",
         tl.col  = "black",
         tl.cex  = 0.8,
         number.cex = 0.7,
         title   = "Correlation Matrix – Continuous Variables at Baseline",
         mar     = c(0, 0, 2, 0))


# ── RISK FACTOR CHANGE ACROSS PERIODS ────────────────────

# Continuous variables: means by period and sex
period_means <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(SYSBP)) %>%
  mutate(SEX_label = ifelse(SEX == 1, "Men", "Women")) %>%
  group_by(SEX_label, PERIOD) %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(c("SYSBP","DIABP","TOTCHOL","BMI",
                             "GLUCOSE","HEARTRTE","CIGPDAY")),
                   ~mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
            .groups = "drop")

print(period_means)

# Line plots of mean risk factors across periods
period_means %>%
  pivot_longer(-c(SEX_label, PERIOD), names_to = "variable", values_to = "mean") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = PERIOD, y = mean, color = SEX_label, group = SEX_label)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  facet_wrap(~variable, scales = "free_y", ncol = 4) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("steelblue", "tomato")) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:3) +
  labs(title = "Mean Risk Factor Values Across Exam Periods by Sex",
       x = "Exam Period", y = "Mean Value", color = "Sex") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 11)

# Binary/categorical vars across periods
cat_period <- df %>%
  mutate(SEX_label = ifelse(SEX == 1, "Men", "Women")) %>%
  group_by(SEX_label, PERIOD) %>%
  summarise(
    Smoker_pct   = mean(CURSMOKE == 1, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    Diabetic_pct = mean(DIABETES == 1, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    BPmeds_pct   = mean(BPMEDS == 1,   na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    PrevHyp_pct  = mean(PREVHYP == 1,  na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    PrevCHD_pct  = mean(PREVCHD == 1,  na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

print(cat_period)

cat_period %>%
  pivot_longer(-c(SEX_label, PERIOD), names_to = "variable", values_to = "pct") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = PERIOD, y = pct, color = SEX_label, group = SEX_label)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  facet_wrap(~variable, scales = "free_y", ncol = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("steelblue", "tomato")) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:3) +
  labs(title = "Prevalence of Binary Risk Factors Across Exam Periods by Sex",
       x = "Exam Period", y = "Percent (%)", color = "Sex") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 11)


# ── PAIRED CHANGE ANALYSIS (completers only) ─────────────

# Participants attending all 3 exams
completers <- df %>%
  group_by(RANDID) %>%
  filter(n() == 3) %>%
  ungroup()

cat("Completers (all 3 exams):", n_distinct(completers$RANDID), "\n")

# Paired t-tests: Period 1 vs Period 3, by sex
paired_vars <- c("SYSBP","DIABP","TOTCHOL","BMI","GLUCOSE","HEARTRTE","CIGPDAY")

paired_results <- map_dfr(paired_vars, function(var) {
  map_dfr(c(1, 2), function(sex_code) {
    wide <- completers %>%
      filter(SEX == sex_code) %>%
      select(RANDID, PERIOD, all_of(var)) %>%
      pivot_wider(names_from = PERIOD, values_from = all_of(var),
                  names_prefix = "P") %>%
      drop_na()
    
    if (nrow(wide) > 5) {
      test <- t.test(wide$P3, wide$P1, paired = TRUE)
      tibble(
        Variable   = var,
        Sex        = ifelse(sex_code == 1, "Men", "Women"),
        N_pairs    = nrow(wide),
        Mean_P1    = mean(wide$P1, na.rm = TRUE),
        Mean_P3    = mean(wide$P3, na.rm = TRUE),
        Mean_diff  = mean(wide$P3 - wide$P1, na.rm = TRUE),
        p_value    = test$p.value
      )
    }
  })
})

print(paired_results %>% mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~round(.x, 3))), n = 40)


# ──PREVALENT DISEASE AT BASELINE ───────────────────────

baseline %>%
  group_by(SEX_label) %>%
  summarise(
    N              = n(),
    PrevStroke_n   = sum(PREVSTRK == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE),
    PrevCHD_n      = sum(PREVCHD  == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE),
    PrevMI_n       = sum(PREVMI   == 1,     na.rm = TRUE),
    PrevHyp_n      = sum(PREVHYP  == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE),
    PrevAP_n       = sum(PREVAP   == 1,     na.rm = TRUE)
  )


# ── TIME-TO-EVENT SUMMARY ────────────────────────────────

baseline %>%
  group_by(SEX_label) %>%
  summarise(
    Median_TIMESTRK = median(TIMESTRK, na.rm = TRUE),
    Min_TIMESTRK    = min(TIMESTRK,    na.rm = TRUE),
    Max_TIMESTRK    = max(TIMESTRK,    na.rm = TRUE),
    N_censored_10y  = sum(TIMESTRK > 3652 & STROKE == "No", na.rm = TRUE),
    N_event_10y     = sum(stroke_10y,   na.rm = TRUE),
    N_died_before10 = sum(TIMEDTH <= 3652 & STROKE != "Yes", na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```
